title: Puthiyakavu Devi Temple
tagline: Puthiyakavu Devi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Puthiyakavu Devi Temple is a temple in Ponkunnam, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Puthiyakavu Devi Temple is a temple in Ponkunnam, Kerala, India. It is a resting place for Sabarimala pilgrims.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Ponkunnam
topPlaces.description: Ponkunnam is a town in Kerala, India, part of Kottayam district under Kanjirappally taluk. Nearby towns are Kanjirappalli, Pampady, Manimala and Pala.

topPlaces.name: Thampalakad
topPlaces.description: Thampalakkad is a small village in Kottayam district, Kerala, which is located around 5 km from Kanjirappally on the way to Manjakuzhy. It has the same distance from Ponkunnam, Manjakuzhy, Koorali, Anakkal, Kappadu, Panamattom and Vanchimala.

topPlaces.name: Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Chirakkadavu Mahadevar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Chirakkadavu in Kottayam, Kerala and is situated between the Kollam-Theni route of the National Highway 183, about 32 km east of the Akshra Nagari, Kottayam city and 3 km south of Ponkunnam en route to Manimala and Erumely.

topPlaces.name: Kanjirappally
topPlaces.description: Kanjirappally is a taluk and a town in Kottayam district situated about 38 km (24 mi) away from the district capital, in the state of Kerala, in southwestern India.

topPlaces.name: Manakkattu Bhadra Temple
topPlaces.description: Manakkattu Sree Bhadra Temple is a Hindu temple located in Chirakkadavu village near Ponkunnam in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Goddess Bhadrakali presides there in the form of "Manakkattuamma".

topPlaces.name: Mallikassery
topPlaces.description: Mallikassery is a small village near Paika, in Elikulam Panchayat of Kanjirappally Taluk in Kottayam district, in the state of Kerala, India. The village lies between Paika and Pinnakkanad, along the Paika–Pinnakkanad road.

topPlaces.name: Panamattom
topPlaces.description: Panamattom or Panamattam is a large village in Kerala, India, a part of Kottayam district. It is located in Kanjirappally Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Kangazha
topPlaces.description: Kangazha is a panchayath and village in the Changanacherry Taluk of the Kottayam District of Kerala State in India. It is located 21 kilometers east of Kottayam and 10 kilometers north of Karukachal.

items.note: Ponkunnam is a town in Kerala, India, part of Kottayam district under Kanjirappally taluk. Nearby towns are Kanjirappalli, Pampady, Manimala and Pala.

Kanjirappally is a taluk and a town in Kottayam district situated about 38 km (24 mi) away from the district capital, in the state of Kerala, in southwestern India.

Mallikassery is a small village near Paika, in Elikulam Panchayat of Kanjirappally Taluk in Kottayam district, in the state of Kerala, India. The village lies between Paika and Pinnakkanad, along the Paika–Pinnakkanad road.
Panamattom or Panamattam is a large village in Kerala, India, a part of Kottayam district. It is located in Kanjirappally Taluk.
Kangazha is a panchayath and village in the Changanacherry Taluk of the Kottayam District of Kerala State in India. It is located 21 kilometers east of Kottayam and 10 kilometers north of Karukachal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Puthiyakavu Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Puthiyakavu Devi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Puthiyakavu Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (76 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Puthiyakavu Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Puthiyakavu Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Puthiyakavu Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Puthiyakavu Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Puthiyakavu Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ponkunnam, Thampalakad, Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple, Kanjirappally, Manakkattu Bhadra Temple.
